name: Filesystem
description: Read and write local files via a relay
longDescription: Expose a folder on your machine to BrowseCortex through a local MCP relay. The AI can list, read, and write files in that folder—handy for saving research, drafting notes, or processing local documents.
author: BrowseCortex
examplePrompts: List the files in my Downloads folder
Read my todo.txt and tell me what's left
Append this link to my reading list file
